title: The Important Events of This Year
description: In this year, according to Ibn Sa'd679-Muhammad b. 'Umar alWagidi, there was a flash flood in Mecca that swept away the pilgrims and inundated the buildings. That year was named the [1o4o] Year of Sweeping Away679 because that flash flood swept away everything in its path. According to Muhammad b. 'Umar -Muhammad b. Rifa'ah b. Tha'labah-his father-his grandfather: The flash flood came down and swept away the pilgrims in the valley of Mecca; that is why it was called the Year of Sweeping Away.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
